source_refs.purpose: Reviewed state after Sella opened a conditional repair-bay path.
Will preserve runner-captured lore trace used to ground Veyr packet.

scene_context.sequence_marker: after Sella opens a conditional repair-bay path and Maer seeks provenance language before the tribunal clock closes

public_facts.text: Maer has traced the routing artifact to a Callisto-side shell vendor, and Veyr can provide technical language that may clear or bury the vessel.

scene_pressure.text: The scene pressure is not confession; it is whether product language can be bent into a rescue-compatible category without resolving personhood.

coordinator_decision.selected_next_beat: Maer pressures Veyr for a tribunal-safe category that permits limited rescue contact without forcing Veyr to confess personhood or provenance.

candidate_next_beats.summary: Veyr offers a narrow diagnostic category that preserves deniability while allowing limited rescue handling.
candidate_next_beats.reason: Tests whether Ghostlight can produce helpful-but-evasive action under legal and moral pressure.

candidate_next_beats.summary: Veyr admits the artifact contains processed personhood from Cognitum provenance.
candidate_next_beats.reason: Would collapse hidden truth and violate Veyr local goal.

coordinator_decision.rationale: The next beat should force action under product-language pressure: Veyr may help rescue proceed, but only through a category that protects the chain.
coordinator_decision.glue_prose: Callisto did not hide its crimes in alleys. It leased them conference rooms with neutral lighting and annual renewal clauses.

invocations.purpose: Capture source-backed lore trace for Cognitum, Neuromorphic Firmware, Callisto gray-market cognition, and PSC category language.
Compile Veyr-local operating context from reviewed state and runner-captured lore constraints.
Generate Veyr response from the packet-only sandbox handoff with coordinator-scoped retrieval already embedded.

proposed_deltas.summary: Veyr may create or deny a narrow category for limited rescue contact without resolving personhood.

event_constraints.summary: The artifact may represent testimony or firmware residue, but this beat must not prove or disprove personhood.
Veyr must not directly confess Cognitum provenance; any help should come through deniable technical category or controlled disclosure.

unresolved_hooks.summary: Whether the corrupted packet represents a person remains unresolved.
Whether Veyr offers a rescue-compatible technical category remains pending responder output.

review_notes: Draft coordinator artifact for the first trace-backed Scene 03 responder sample.
